scripts.build-patch: npm run version:patch && npm run compile && npm run minify
scripts.build-minor: npm run version:minor && npm run compile && npm run minify
scripts.build-major: npm run version:major && npm run compile && npm run minify
scripts.git:push: git add . && node -e "const d=new Date();const pad=n=>n.toString().padStart(2,'0');let h=d.getHours();const ampm=h>=12?'PM':'AM';h=h%12||12;const msg=`${pad(d.getMonth()+1)}-${pad(d.getDate())}-${d.getFullYear()} ${pad(h)}:${pad(d.getMinutes())} ${ampm}`;require('child_process').execSync(`git commit -m \"${msg}\"`,{stdio:'inherit'});" && git push origin main
